data.description: RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context serves LIBERO-Plus.
RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context cites or references OpenVLA: An Open-Source Vision-Language-Action Model.

RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context cites or references World Action Models: The Next Frontier in Embodied AI.
OmniAction Dataset is based on RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context.
EgoVLA: Learning Vision-Language-Action Models from Egocentric Human Videos cites or references RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context.
RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context uses or builds on NVIDIA Jetson Thor.
The RoboOmni paper introduces and releases the OmniAction dataset for training omni-modal VLA models.
RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context evaluates or benchmarks HumanoidBench.
OpenVLA: An Open-Source Vision-Language-Action Model cites or references RoboOmni: Proactive Robot Manipulation in Omni-modal Context.
RoboOmni is evaluated on LIBERO benchmarks using the OmniAction-LIBERO data split.
